name: Blackberry Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a fine-mesh strainer with two layers of dampened cheesecloth and place it over a large bowl.
2. Combine blackberries and water in a medium saucepan.
3. Slowly bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer gently until soft, about 10 minutes.
4. Pour into the lined strainer. Let stand until juice has drained into the bowl, about 30 minutes.
5. Gently squeeze pulp to extract remaining juice.
6. Measure berry juice into a saucepan. Add 1 cup sugar for each cup of juice.
7. Cook over low heat, swirling pan occasionally, until sugar dissolves. Increase heat and boil syrup for 2 minutes.
8. Cool completely.
9. Mix the cream with the cooled syrup.
10. Refrigerate until well chilled.
11. Process blackberry mixture in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions; the ice cream will be soft.
12. Freeze in a covered container several hours to mellow flavors.
13. Garnish with fresh berries and mint leaves.
